allowlist-domain.description: Add one or more domains to the proxy allowlist. Usage: allowlist-domain <domain> [<domain>...]

run-with-network.description: Run a shell command with network access. May require first allowlisting domains. Pass the command via --command, e.g. --command "npm install". Supports pipes, &&, env vars, etc.

expose-port.description: Expose a port to the network. Use --help for more details.
